journal_entry.description: Moving services provided to customer, payment received by certified cheque
journal_entry.rationale: Atlas Van Lines provided moving services and received payment. This is a revenue transaction. Debit tuple (1,0,0,0,0,0) indicates one asset increase (Cash/Bank from certified cheque). Credit tuple (0,0,1,0,0,0) indicates one revenue increase (Moving Services Revenue or similar). The certified cheque represents immediate payment, increasing the cash asset. Revenue is recognized when services are provided per IFRS 15. No tax information was provided in the lookup results, so proceeding without tax lines (may be exempt or tax-inclusive depending on jurisdiction and service type). Total debits = total credits = $25,500.
